files.help:
Export the following environment variable (supported since https://github.com/nim-lang/choosenim/commit/458e741411c51ff39158c53acf94cc98d6aaa5e1):

```bash
export CHOOSENIM_DIR="$XDG_DATA_HOME/choosenim"
```

Or use an alias (supported since https://github.com/nim-lang/choosenim/commit/2cdb45e0d6707e74f9925b90ab56f1097f804ebe):

```bash
alias choosenim='choosenim --choosenimDir:"$XDG_DATA_HOME/choosenim'
```

Additionally, make sure to set `NIMBLE_DIR`.
